title: The value of Grafana Fleet Management

blocks.content:
Grafana Fleet Management is a Grafana Cloud feature that enables you to manage collector deployments at scale.

With a central control hub, you can manage configurations across all collectors. You can create, activate, deactivate, or adjust configuration pipelines remotely from the Grafana Cloud interface.

Fleet Management also gives you visibility into the health of your collector fleet. You can view dashboards that track metrics for component health, system resources, remote configuration load health, and deployment infrastructure.

In the next milestone, you determine whether your collector is already registered with Fleet Management.
